process_registry.docstring_head: callable.py — Universal Entrypoint for the Execution Arm

ttlg.scout: Universal entrypoint. execute() + execute_async() + health() + install_event_bus_handler(). Inputs: task, mode_hint, max_steps, context. Outputs: dict result with 'selection' attached.
ttlg.thinker: Bridges in-process, event-bus, and REST (via AZ bridge). 'Callable by any component' (Sovereign directive) satisfied.
ttlg.gate_reason: Three surfaces unified behind one core; thread-safe singleton arms.

ttlg.scout: ComputerUse arm — tool loop (computer + bash + str_replace_editor). Inputs: task, mode, max_turns, context. Outputs: ArmResult. Dependencies: anthropic SDK, xdotool, scrot, Xvfb. Failure modes: missing deps → 'unavailable' health; destructive bash triggers deletion gate.
ttlg.thinker: Net-new capability. Bash heuristic catches destructive patterns (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, docker rm...). No overlap with BrowserUse.
ttlg.gate_reason: Article XVI §3 satisfied; deletion gate integrated; bash destructive-heuristic present.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: four tool handlers (bash, str_replace_editor, computer, screenshot) implemented; deletion gate wired.

ttlg.gate_reason: Hard-rule compliance; logs every attempt; raises DeletionRefused on denial.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: enforces the Sovereign hard-rule verbatim.

process_registry.docstring_head: mode_selector.py — Reasoning Router for the Four Execution Variants

ttlg.scout: Reasoning router. Inputs: task + context + mode_hint. Outputs: Selection (arm, mode, reason, confidence). Dependency: none beyond stdlib. Failure modes: defaults safely to browser_use.headless.
ttlg.thinker: Deterministic, testable reasoner. Overlap with: nothing. Risk: rule drift as task vocabulary evolves; mitigated by explicit override paths.
ttlg.gate_reason: Article XVI §3 'reasoning that determines when each is necessary' fully satisfied.
ttlg.analyst_note: Spec ↔ actual match: confidence field + explicit overrides + safe default all present.
